prompt: Create a cinematic vertical sci-fi action illustration of a female android warrior aboard a spaceship in a devastated spacecraft corridor during a hull breach. The central subject is a sleek feminine android in glossy white segmented biomechanical armor, athletic build, kneeling and twisting in a dynamic combat pose, with very long flowing silver-white hair streaming wildly in zero gravity; her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur or visor-like neutral mask so no facial features are visible. She holds a glowing blue-white energy blade or plasma sword diagonally across the foreground, striking a massive black mechanical scorpion enemy. The enemy is one giant robotic scorpion with two large claw arms, a heavy armored body, multiple articulated legs, and one arched segmented tail ending in a sharp stinger with a red glowing tip; include red sensor lights in its head and tail. Show bright sparks exploding where the blade hits the scorpion claw, with flying shrapnel, metallic debris, shattered glass, electrical arcs, and star-like particles filling the scene. The setting is the dark interior of a futuristic spaceship with exposed panels, cables, grated metal floor, warning screens, and a huge torn opening to outer space behind them; through the breach, show Earth’s blue curve and a starfield. Include exactly two visible warning displays on the left wall, with readable red text such as HULL BREACH / SECTOR 7-A / WARNING. Use dramatic wide-angle perspective, intense motion, high contrast, cold blue rim light from space, red emergency highlights, volumetric particles, hyper-detailed hard-surface mecha design, photorealistic anime-real sci-fi concept art, ultra-detailed metal scratches and reflections, cinematic depth of field, no extra characters, no watermark, no captions beyond the warning displays.
